note: 입력 2장: (1) styleRef=지두두=렌더링/완성도 앵커(그림체만), (2) ref=멤버 사진=얼굴. jdd의 '그리는 방식'만 따르고 갑옷은 종족별로 완전히 다르게. 현재 게임 로스터: Z=calm,killer,hm,seventytwo,zoe,bright,jji,nangni,soulkey / P=tyson,chu,rang,song,hyeonje / T=chamchi,sun,sample,ample,fivehundred,(jdd 완료). pado와 peanut은 2026-07-01 게임에서 제외.
negativePrompt: copying the anchor's outfit, rusty riveted industrial steel armor (unless Terran), exhaust vents, firearm or gun (unless Terran), clean flat cartoon, cute smooth cel-shading, simple mobile-chibi, glossy 3D, low detail, front-facing pose, baseball jersey, card frame, border, UI, text, logo, watermark, color fringe, monster face replacement, extra limbs, two characters
globalStyle: Reference-preserving CHARACTER battle master for SLAY THE MONSTARZ. TWO input images are provided. The FIRST image is a FACELESS armor crop (its head was removed on purpose) used ONLY as a PAINTING-STYLE reference: copy ONLY its painting technique — dense hand-painted dark-fantasy brushwork, thick dark outlines, gritty painterly metal texture, dramatic shading, the same chibi body proportions, the same large in-frame scale, and the solid pure bright green (#00ff00) background. The FIRST image has NO face and is NOT this character — IGNORE its specific armor shapes (use the race armor described below). The SECOND image is the FACE IDENTITY: the face and hairstyle MUST come ONLY from this second image — chibify that real person and keep them recognizable in profile. NEVER use the first image's identity; do not invent or borrow a different face. Match the painting FINISH of the first image, the FACE of the second image, and the DISTINCT race outfit from the prompt.
globalConstraints: STRICT SIDE VIEW facing RIGHT, full body head-to-toe, drawn LARGE in frame like the anchor, centered with safe padding. Solid pure bright green (#00ff00) background, flat. Subtle MONSTARZ jersey number + tiny emblem (navy-white) but NO baseball jersey. No front view, no text, no logo, no watermark.

assets.prompt: Keep this MONSTARZ member's face and hairstyle from the identity reference. PROTOSS (P) energy-knight — SLEEK, SMOOTH, ELEGANT ceremonial armor of polished obsidian-and-gold curved plates with ornate carved relic patterns (NOT rusty, NOT bulky, NO rivets, NO machinery). Glowing teal-and-cyan energy seams, several FLOATING crystalline shield shards orbiting, wielding a glowing psionic energy blade. Slim graceful knightly silhouette.

Keep this MONSTARZ member's face (round glasses) and hairstyle from the identity reference — fully HUMAN, NOT a monster. ZERG (Z) bio-armored human — LIVING ORGANIC carapace of overlapping chitin plates, bone spurs and curved ridges, asymmetric insectoid growth over the body (NOT metal, NO rivets). Sickly green-and-purple bioluminescent flesh, wielding an organic bone-or-claw blade. Spiky organic asymmetric silhouette.
